name: education_mutual_aid_request_northpine_car_fair
premise: A field trip bus broke down; chaperones are split on whether to charter private vans without vendor vetting. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education mutual aid request northpine car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Inez Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Inez Ishikawa, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Santos
agents.identity: I am Hector Santos, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on fairness.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on fairness for immediate traction on care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Inez Ishikawa must choose under care versus fairness. What does Inez Ishikawa do?
